_comment: Overrides the project cards fetched from GitHub. The KEY = the EXACT GitHub repo name. Every field is optional: only set what you want to replace (the rest comes from GitHub automatically). Set "hidden": true to hide a repo.

bullets: Full pipeline: dataset, CLIP training, then generator training
Centralized configuration (network architecture, CLIP, generation, dataset) via YAML
CLI tools: checkpoint inspection, dimension checks, Collada export

marketplace.tagline: memory & code mapping for Claude Code
bullets: Embedding-based code index, zero LLM calls at ingestion
Episodic memory arbitrated once per session
Roadmap ↔ code graph: each task linked to the symbols it produced
